title: Helmut Hölbling Spedition GmbH ransomware incident

extortion.description: Helmut Hölbling Spedition GmbH is a full-service provider for transport and provide their customers with the best possible supportin all their needs.We are ready to upload a lot of essential corporate documents such as: contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), etc.
